acceptedInputPatterns: face and full hair outline clearly visible
even lighting with no hat or heavy occlusion
defaultImageRequirements: hair not cropped by the frame
no hat, hands, or heavy shadow covering the hair

seoContent: Describe a one-image visual hairstyle preview.
Explain that results vary with angle, hair visibility, occlusion, and prompt.
localPreview: Verify Women and Men each show at least ten visual templates.
Verify preset prompts are not visible to users.
Verify Custom shows one localized hairstyle description input and no template cards.
Verify Replace works for the default and uploaded single image.
designBrief: Use one consistent female model for all Women templates and one consistent male model for all Men templates.
Replace placeholders with real hairstyle template images and use them as optional hidden reference images.
pmReview: Block multi-image messaging and visible model branding.
Block face-shape analysis and exact haircut claims.
